previous_headings: 1. S3 in this package
title: S3 vs R6 in rtfreporter — a hands-on tour
text: rtf_table_style S3 list holds default values rtftable() consume. Critically, values snapshotted time rtftable() runs: t1 snapshotted header_bold = FALSE construction; later mutation style affects newly constructed tables. behaviour intuitive, easy reason , right default defaults bag.
code: style <- rtf_table_style_tfl() t1    <- rtftable(data.frame(A = 1:2), style = style) style$header_bold <- TRUE                          # too late t2    <- rtftable(data.frame(A = 1:2), style = style) c(t1 = t1$col_spec[[1L]]$header_bold,   t2 = t2$col_spec[[1L]]$header_bold) #>    t1    t2  #> FALSE  TRUE

title: S3 vs R6 in rtfreporter — a hands-on tour
text: exactly one situation rtfreporter wants opposite snapshot semantics: shared mutable theme multiple tables observe real time. Suppose 20 tables report, using “company TFL look”, partway review decide flip header_bold globally. S3 style either rebuild 20 tables pre-empt change construction. R6 theme one assignment: trick rtftable() stores R6 reference tbl$theme renderer calls small internal helper (.refresh_theme(tbl)) render re-snapshot theme’s current state. t1 t2 reflect mutation next render rebuild. one trick S3 cleanly: S3 lists copy--modify, mutation theme never propagate already-constructed tables.
code: theme <- rtf_theme(header_bold = FALSE) df1   <- data.frame(A = 1:2, B = c("x", "y")) df2   <- data.frame(A = 3:4, B = c("p", "q")) t1    <- rtftable(df1, theme = theme) t2    <- rtftable(df2, theme = theme)  inherits(theme, "R6") #> [1] TRUE inherits(theme, "rtf_theme") #> [1] TRUE  # Mutate the theme — every referencing table now renders bold headers theme$header_bold <- TRUE

what: 4. Putting the choice into your own packages
title: S3 vs R6 in rtfreporter — a hands-on tour
text: Use list starting checklist. Pick S3 unless several rows push towards R6. R6 powerful tool. every R6 class package adds dependency, hides behaviour behind methods, breaks simple “R-values immutable” mental model. Used sparingly — exactly rtfreporter — gives something genuinely build cleanly way. Used reflexively just adds noise.

title: Example: Demographics Table (Table 14.1.1)
text: 入力: 統計処理済みの data.frame（demog_p1, demog_p2） 出力: RTF ファイル（1 セクション、共通ヘッダー/フッター、2 ページ） ページ分割はカテゴリ単位で行い、最大 26 行を超えないようにあらかじめ demog_p1（25 行）と demog_p2（19 行）に分割済みです。

title: Example: Demographics Table (Table 14.1.1)
code: library(rtfreporter)  data_dir <- system.file("extdata", package = "rtfreporter") if (!nzchar(data_dir)) data_dir <- file.path("..", "..", "inst", "extdata")  demog_p1 <- readRDS(file.path(data_dir, "demog_p1.rds")) demog_p2 <- readRDS(file.path(data_dir, "demog_p2.rds"))  cat(sprintf("Page 1: %d rows x %d cols\n", nrow(demog_p1), ncol(demog_p1))) Page 1: 25 rows x 4 cols cat(sprintf("Page 2: %d rows x %d cols\n", nrow(demog_p2), ncol(demog_p2))) Page 2: 19 rows x 4 cols # データ構造の確認（先頭 8 行） head(demog_p1, 8) Label      Drug A      Drug B       Total 1 Age Group, n (%) 2              <65  10 (33.3%)  12 (40.0%)  22 (36.7%) 3           65-<75  14 (46.7%)  12 (40.0%)  26 (43.3%) 4             >=75   6 (20.0%)   6 (20.0%)  12 (20.0%) 5      Age (years) 6                N          30          30          60 7        Mean (SD) 63.2 (9.14) 67.0 (8.31) 65.1 (8.85) 8           Median        64.0        67.5        66.0

title: Example: Demographics Table (Table 14.1.1)
text: eval=FALSE のため上記チャンクはデフォルトで実行されません。 実行するには eval=TRUE に変更するか、コンソールで直接実行してください。
code: # ── 1 セクション、2 ページ ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── page_cfg <- list(orientation = "landscape",                  width_in = 11, height_in = 8.5,                  margin_top_in = 0.75, margin_bottom_in = 0.75,                  margin_left_in = 0.5, margin_right_in = 0.5)  doc <- rtf_document() |>   rtf_config(page = page_cfg) |>   rtf_tables(list(tbl_p1)) |>            # page 1   rtf_tables(list(tbl_p2)) |>            # page 2   rtf_section(page   = 1:2,               secinfo = list(header = hdr, footer = ftr))  out_file <- tempfile(fileext = ".rtf") generate_rtfreport(doc, out_file, overwrite = TRUE) cat("RTF generated:", out_file, "\n")

title: Example: Lab Toxicity Grade Shift Table (Table 14.3.x)
code: make_shift_tbl <- function(df) {   rtftable(     data                = df,     col_header          = col_hdr_row,     spanning_header     = spanning_hdr,     column_widths_twips = col_widths,     col_spec            = c(       list(list(col = 1L, align = "left")),       lapply(2:19, \(j) list(col = j, align = "center"))     ),     row_height_twips    = 360L,   # 2 行テキスト対応（n\n(x.x%)）     border              = "tfl",     table_align         = "left"   ) }  # 全検査項目の rtftable を生成 shift_tbls <- lapply(lab_params, \(p) make_shift_tbl(p$data)) names(shift_tbls) <- sapply(lab_params, \(p) p$paramcd)

id: ヘッダー定義共通-検査項目別
what: ヘッダー定義（共通 + 検査項目別）
title: Example: Lab Toxicity Grade Shift Table (Table 14.3.x)
code: # ── 共通ヘッダー2行 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── common_hdr_rows <- list(   c(l = "Protocol: STUDY001",     r = "Drug Co., Ltd."),   c(l = "Table 14.3.x  Toxicity Grade Shift Table",     r = "Page {AUTO_PAGE} of {AUTO_TOTAL_PAGES}") )  # ── 検査項目別ヘッダー生成 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── # update_header_row() で共通ヘッダーの3行目に検査名を追加 make_lab_hdr <- function(param_label) {   hdr <- rtf_header(rows = common_hdr_rows)   update_header_row(hdr, row = 3L, content = c(c = param_label)) }  lab_hdrs <- lapply(lab_params, \(p) make_lab_hdr(p$param)) names(lab_hdrs) <- sapply(lab_params, \(p) p$paramcd)  # 確認: HGB ヘッダーの行構成 cat("HGB header rows:\n") HGB header rows: for (i in seq_along(lab_hdrs$HGB$rows)) {   cat(sprintf("  [%d] %s\n", i,               paste(names(lab_hdrs$HGB$rows[[i]]),                     lab_hdrs$HGB$rows[[i]], sep = "=", collapse = "  |  "))) } [1] l=Protocol: STUDY001  |  r=Drug Co., Ltd.   [2] l=Table 14.3.x  Toxicity Grade Shift Table  |  r=Page {AUTO_PAGE} of {AUTO_TOTAL_PAGES}   [3] c=Hemoglobin (g/dL) # ── 共通フッター ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── common_ftr <- rtf_footer(rows = list(   c(l = paste0("Run date: ", Sys.Date()),     c = "CONFIDENTIAL",     r = "DRAFT") ))

title: Example: Lab Toxicity Grade Shift Table (Table 14.3.x)
text: eval=FALSE のため上記チャンクはデフォルトで実行されません。
code: # 3 ページ × 3 セクション（各セクションに検査項目名入りヘッダー） page_cfg <- list(orientation = "landscape",                  width_in = 11, height_in = 8.5,                  margin_top_in = 0.75, margin_bottom_in = 0.75,                  margin_left_in = 0.5, margin_right_in = 0.5)  doc <- rtf_document() |> rtf_config(page = page_cfg)  for (i in seq_along(lab_params)) {   pcd <- lab_params[[i]]$paramcd   doc <- doc |>     rtf_tables(list(shift_tbls[[pcd]])) |>     rtf_section(page    = i,                 secinfo = list(header = lab_hdrs[[pcd]],                                footer = common_ftr)) }  out_file <- tempfile(fileext = ".rtf") generate_rtfreport(doc, out_file, overwrite = TRUE) cat("RTF generated:", out_file, "\n")

title: Example: Lab Toxicity Grade Shift Table (Table 14.3.x)
text: update_header_row() を使い、共通 2 行に検査名を 3 行目として追加します。 RTF では \sect でセクションが切り替わるたびに {\header} が出力されるため、 各ページのヘッダー 3 行目が自動的に検査項目名に切り替わります。 シフトテーブルのセル値は "12\n(40.0%)" 形式で、 rtfreporter がセル内の \n を RTF の \line に変換します。 row_height_twips = 360L で 2 行分の高さを確保しています。
code:
make_lab_hdr <- function(param_label) {   hdr <- rtf_header(rows = list(     c(l = "Protocol: STUDY001",       r = "Company"),     c(l = "Table 14.3.x Shift Table", r = "Page {AUTO_PAGE} of {AUTO_TOTAL_PAGES}")   ))   update_header_row(hdr, row = 3L, content = c(c = param_label)) } # Level 1 (spanning): Drug A / Drug B / Total spanning_header = list(   list(from = 2L, to = 7L,  label = "Drug A
(N=30)", underline = TRUE),   list(from = 8L, to = 13L, label = "Drug B
(N=30)", underline = TRUE),   list(from = 14L, to = 19L, label = "Total
(N=60)", underline = TRUE) )  # Level 2 (col_header): Baseline Grade | 0 1 2 3 4 Total × 3 col_header = c("Baseline
Grade", rep(c("0","1","2","3","4","Total"), 3L))

text: rtfreporter は臨床試験向け RTF レポート（テーブル・リスティング・フィギュア、TFL）を 生成する R パッケージです。v0.0.19 以降、公開・内部とも全クラスが S3 に統一されています（Imports: R6 も DESCRIPTION から削除）。

title: rtfreporter 外部インターフェース仕様書
code: library(rtfreporter) library(magrittr)  df1 <- data.frame(   Parameter = c("Age (years)", "Sex: Male"),   N = c("50", "28"),   Mean_SD = c("45.2 (12.1)", "56.0%") )  report <- rtf_document() %>%   rtf_section(page = 1, secinfo = list(     header = rtf_header(rows = list(       c(l = "Protocol: XXX-001", r = "ACME Pharma"),       c(l = "Table 14.1.1",     r = "Page {AUTO_PAGE} of {AUTO_TOTAL_PAGES}")     )),     footer = rtf_footer(c(l = "Confidential - For Clinical Study Use Only"))   )) %>%   rtf_tables(list(rtftable(df1, col_header = c("Parameter", "N", "Mean (SD)"))))  generate_rtfreport(report, "output/t14_1_1.rtf", overwrite = TRUE)

id: rtf_document-文書オブジェクト作成
what: rtf_document() — 文書オブジェクト作成
title: rtfreporter 外部インターフェース仕様書
text: 戻り値: rtf_document S3 オブジェクト。 デフォルトページ設定（臨床試験向け）:
code: rtf_document(   font_table    = NULL,   # NULL = list(list(name = "Courier"))   color_table   = NULL,   # NULL = c("#000000")   page          = NULL,   # NULL = landscape Letter, 0.75"/0.5" margins   default_format = NULL   # NULL = 9pt, single spacing )

title: rtfreporter 外部インターフェース仕様書
text: NULL を渡したパラメータは変更されません。新しいコピーを返します（元のオブジェクトは不変）。
code: rtf_config(doc, font_table=NULL, color_table=NULL, page=NULL, default_format=NULL)

id: rtf_tables-コンテンツページ追加
what: rtf_tables() — コンテンツページ追加
title: rtfreporter 外部インターフェース仕様書
text: 仕様: tables の各要素は 1ページ＝1コンテンツ に対応します。1ページに表と図を併置するような multi-content 構成はサポートしません。 data.frame — rtf_tables() の書式引数が既定値として適用されます。 rtftable() の戻り値（S3 クラス rtftable）— 自身の設定が優先されます。 rtfplot() の戻り値（S3 クラス rtfplot）。 書式引数（col_rel_width, border, row_height_twips …）は bare data.frame 要素にのみ 適用されます。rtftable() で構築済みの要素には影響しません。 例:
code: rtf_tables(   doc, tables,   # 以下の書式引数は bare data.frame 要素にのみ適用される   col_header              = NULL,   spanning_header         = NULL,   col_spec                = NULL,   border                  = "tfl",   blank_rows              = NULL,   col_rel_width           = NULL,   column_widths_twips     = NULL,   table_width_twips       = NULL,   table_width_pct_of_writable = NULL,   table_width_pct         = NULL,   table_align             = "left",   row_height_twips        = NULL,     # NULL→文書フォント由来のデフォルト   row_height_exact        = FALSE,   header_row_height_twips = NULL,   blank_row_height_twips  = NULL,   cell_padding_left_twips  = 72L,   cell_padding_right_twips = 72L,   cell_valign             = "bottom",   auto_section            = FALSE,   section_label_align     = "left" ) # 各要素が1ページ rtf_tables(doc, list(   df1,                         # data.frame → 下の col_rel_width / border が適用   rtftable(df2, border="none"),# rtftable: 自身の border="none" 優先   rtfplot("fig.png")           # 図 ), col_rel_width = c(2, 1, 1), border = "tfl", row_height_twips = 280L)

id: タイトル-フットノート
what: タイトル / フットノート
title: rtfreporter 外部インターフェース仕様書
text: 各ページの コンテンツの上に配置するタイトル、下に配置するフットノート は、character vector で指定します。各要素が 1 段落（1 行）に対応します。フォントサイズは文書共通設定（デフォルト 9pt）。 title: footnote: 各要素 = 1 段落。最初の段落の上端に細い罫線（content との視覚的区切り）。左寄せがデフォルト。 "" は空段落。NULL / character(0) で抑制。 pipe API:
code: rtf_document() %>%   rtf_tables(list(df1, df2),     titles = list(       c("Table 14.1.1", "", "Safety Population"),    # 中央太字 → 空行 → 中央太字       "Table 14.1.2"     ),     footnotes = list(       c("Note 1: foo.", "", "Note 2: bar."),       NULL     )   )  # あるいは後付けで doc %>%   rtf_tables(list(df1, df2)) %>%   rtf_titles(list("Page One", "Page Two")) %>%   rtf_footnotes(list(NULL, "Footer of page 2"))

title: rtfreporter 外部インターフェース仕様書
text: 仕様: figures の各要素は 1ページ＝1図 に対応します。 文字列パス（PNG / JPEG）— width_twips / height_twips / align が適用されます。 rtfplot() の戻り値 — 自身の設定が優先されます。
code: rtf_figures(doc, figures,   width_twips = NULL, height_twips = NULL, align = "center") rtf_figures(doc,   list("fig1.png", "fig2.png", rtfplot("fig3.png", align = "left")),   width_twips = 9000L )

title: rtfreporter 外部インターフェース仕様書
text: セクションはヘッダー/フッターを制御します。page 引数で「このページからこのセクションを開始」を指定します。 典型的なパターン:
code: rtf_section(doc, page, secinfo) doc %>%   rtf_tables(list(df1, df2, df3)) %>%   rtf_section(page = 1, secinfo = list(header = hdr1, footer = ftr1)) %>%   rtf_section(page = 3, secinfo = list(header = hdr2, footer = ftr2)) # → ページ1-2はセクション1のヘッダー/フッター # → ページ3はセクション2のヘッダー/フッター

title: rtfreporter 外部インターフェース仕様書
text: 各要素はラベル行（文字ベクタ）または spanning 行（list(, , label, underline) の list）。両者を混在可能。 NULL（既定）: 各列の データ配置（col_spec の align）を継承 スカラ "center" 等: 全列共通 長さ ncol の character vector: 列ごとに上書き 優先順位は col_spec[[j]]$header_align（個別指定）> col_header_align > col_spec[[j]]$align（継承）。 col_header の上に置く単一の spanning 行を別引数で指定する旧 API。col_header 内に spanning 行を直接書ける現代的な記法を推奨。 spanning 仕様の各フィールド: アラインメント: spanning セルの既定配置は、その 直下の階層（カバーしている最左列の col_spec[[]]$header_align、最終的にデータ列の align）を継承します。 優先順位: sp$align > col_spec[[sp$]]$header_align > "center"。col_header 内に書いた spanning 行も同じ規則が適用されます。書式（bold/italic/underline）はいずれも既定 FALSE、必要な装飾は明示的に opt-してください。 任意の組み合わせを list で渡せます（位置は和集合）: 既定 TRUE。attr(data, "rtf_blank_rows") が数値ベクタなら、blank_rows 引数が NULL のときに既定値として取り込みます。将来、他の属性も同様に取り込み予定（.read_data_attributes() を拡張）。 column_widths_twips — 絶対幅（最高優先） col_rel_width × テーブル幅 — 相対幅 table_width_twips — テーブル幅（均等分割） table_width_pct_of_writable × 書き込み可能幅 書き込み可能幅（フォールバック）
code: rtftable(   data,                              # data.frame または list(df1, df2, ...) (multi-DF)   col_header              = NULL,    # NULL | chr vec | list(label/spanning row 混在)   col_header_align        = NULL,    # NULL（align継承）| scalar | length-ncol   spanning_header         = NULL,    # 後方互換: col_header の上に置く単一spanning行   col_spec                = NULL,    # 列書式仕様リスト（§参照）   border                  = "tfl",   # "tfl" | "none" | rtf_table_border()   blank_rows              = NULL,    # integer / by_change / by_rule / list of mixed   read_attributes         = TRUE,    # data.frame attr の取り込み (rtf_blank_rows ほか)   col_rel_width           = NULL,    # 相対列幅 c(3,1,1,2)   column_widths_twips     = NULL,    # 絶対列幅（最優先）   table_width_twips       = NULL,   table_width_pct_of_writable = NULL,   table_width_pct         = NULL,    # 0-100   table_align             = "left",   row_height_twips        = NULL,    # NULL=リソース既定（フォント依存）   row_height_exact        = FALSE,   header_row_height_twips = NULL,   blank_row_height_twips  = NULL,   cell_padding_left_twips  = 72L,   cell_padding_right_twips = 72L,   cell_valign             = "bottom" ) # 単一行 — 文字ベクタ rtftable(df, col_header = c("Treatment", "N", "Mean (SD)"))  # 単一行 — パイプ区切り文字列 rtftable(df, col_header = "Treatment | N | Mean (SD)")  # 複数行（ラベル行のみ） rtftable(df, col_header = list(   c("", "Arm A", "Arm B"),   c("Item", "N", "Mean", "N", "Mean") ))  # 複数行：spanning 行 + ラベル行 rtftable(df, col_header = list(   # 1 行目: spanning   list(     list(from = 2, to = 3, label = "Arm A (N=30)", underline = TRUE),     list(from = 4, to = 5, label = "Arm B (N=30)", underline = TRUE)   ),   # 2 行目: 列ラベル   c("Item", "N", "Mean", "N", "Mean") )) rtftable(df,   col_header = c("Item", "N", "Mean", "N", "Mean"),   spanning_header = list(     list(from = 2, to = 3, label = "Arm A", underline = TRUE),     list(from = 4, to = 5, label = "Arm B", underline = TRUE)   ) ) list(from = 2, to = 3, label = "Default Inherit", underline = TRUE)               # 下の階層から継承 list(from = 2, to = 3, label = "Always Center",   underline = TRUE, align = "center")  # 明示上書き list(from = 2, to = 3, label = "Bold Spanning",   bold = TRUE, italic = TRUE) rtftable(df, blank_rows = list(   c(-1),   blank_rows_by_change("Visit",     include_before_first = FALSE, include_after_last = FALSE),   blank_rows_by_rule("Param", "^Total", "before") ))

title: rtfreporter 外部インターフェース仕様書
text: 各要素はラベル行（文字ベクタ）または spanning 行（list(, , label, underline) の list）。両者を混在可能。
code: # 単一行 — 文字ベクタ rtftable(df, col_header = c("Treatment", "N", "Mean (SD)"))  # 単一行 — パイプ区切り文字列 rtftable(df, col_header = "Treatment | N | Mean (SD)")  # 複数行（ラベル行のみ） rtftable(df, col_header = list(   c("", "Arm A", "Arm B"),   c("Item", "N", "Mean", "N", "Mean") ))  # 複数行：spanning 行 + ラベル行 rtftable(df, col_header = list(   # 1 行目: spanning   list(     list(from = 2, to = 3, label = "Arm A (N=30)", underline = TRUE),     list(from = 4, to = 5, label = "Arm B (N=30)", underline = TRUE)   ),   # 2 行目: 列ラベル   c("Item", "N", "Mean", "N", "Mean") ))

title: rtfreporter 外部インターフェース仕様書
text: NULL（既定）: 各列の データ配置（col_spec の align）を継承 スカラ "center" 等: 全列共通 長さ ncol の character vector: 列ごとに上書き 優先順位は col_spec[[j]]$header_align（個別指定）> col_header_align > col_spec[[j]]$align（継承）。

title: rtfreporter 外部インターフェース仕様書
text: col_header の上に置く単一の spanning 行を別引数で指定する旧 API。col_header 内に spanning 行を直接書ける現代的な記法を推奨。 spanning 仕様の各フィールド: アラインメント: spanning セルの既定配置は、その 直下の階層（カバーしている最左列の col_spec[[]]$header_align、最終的にデータ列の align）を継承します。 優先順位: sp$align > col_spec[[sp$]]$header_align > "center"。col_header 内に書いた spanning 行も同じ規則が適用されます。書式（bold/italic/underline）はいずれも既定 FALSE、必要な装飾は明示的に opt-してください。

id: デフォルトのセル高さ行高さ
what: デフォルトのセル高さ（行高さ）
title: rtfreporter 外部インターフェース仕様書
text: すべての「テーブル形式の要素」── RTF ページのヘッダー/フッター、表の列ヘッダ行、データ行、空白セパレータ行、フットノート ── は共通のデフォルト行高さを使います。値は 文書のフォントサイズに依存し、inst/resources/rtfreporter_defaults.R のルックアップから解決されます。 個別指定の優先順位: これら個別指定が NULL（既定）の場合、上記リソースから引いたデフォルトが適用されます。フットノートは現状個別指定 API なし。 セルの罫線とテキストの間隔も同じくリソース既定値で全要素統一されます: これは表本体・タイトル・フットノート・ページヘッダー/フッター すべてに適用されます。rtf_header() / rtf_footer() の cell_padding_left_twips / cell_padding_right_twips 引数で個別上書き可能。rtftable() の同名引数も従来通り。 特殊値: NULL（既定）: 文書フォントサイズに対応するリソースのデフォルトを使用 正の整数: 明示的な高さ（twips）。row_height_exact = TRUE で固定高、FALSE（既定）で最小高 0L: 旧来の「自動」（\trrh を出力しない）。後方互換のため残存
code: rtfreporter_defaults <- list(   default_row_height_twips_by_font_half_points = list(     "16" = 210L,   #  8pt     "18" = 230L,   #  9pt  ← package default     "20" = 250L,   # 10pt     "22" = 270L,   # 11pt     "24" = 290L,   # 12pt     ...   ),   default_row_height_twips_per_half_point = 12.8,   # ルックアップにない場合の線形式   default_row_height_twips_min            = 180L    # 下限値 ) default_cell_padding_left_twips  = 72L default_cell_padding_right_twips = 72L

title: rtfreporter 外部インターフェース仕様書
text: 複数の表で共通の書式テンプレートを使いたい場合のスタイルレコード。1 度作って多くの rtftable() に渡すパターン: スタイルの値は 各 rtftable() がコンストラクタ時点でスナップショット します。スタイル側を後から書き換えても、すでに構築済みの table には反映されません（v0.0.19 で R6 → S3 統一に伴い変更）。テーマを切り替えたい場合は派生スタイルを作り直して新しい table に渡してください。 非破壊的に派生させたい場合は rtf_table_style_with(style, field = value, ...): 内部的には .style_to_table_border(style) で rtf_table_border に変換されます（非公開ヘルパー）。 カラムヘッダ行に対し、列ごとに罫線を上書きできます: zone 罫線と列罫線の per-cell マージ: effective[j] = zone_header_border × col_spec[[j]]$border（後者が優先）。 S3 統一アーキテクチャと R6 を廃止した理由は LEARNING.md を参照。
code: tfl <- rtf_table_style_tfl()               # 既製の TFL プリセット  tbls <- lapply(dfs, function(df) rtftable(df, style = tfl)) heavy <- rtf_table_style_with(tfl,             header_bold     = TRUE,             border_last_row = rtf_border(bottom = rtf_border_side("thick", 30L))) rtftable(df,   border   = rtf_table_border(header = rtf_border(top = rtf_border_side(),                                                     bottom = rtf_border_side())),   col_spec = list(     list(col = "Total",          border = rtf_border(bottom = rtf_border_side("double", 20L)))   ) )

title: rtfreporter 外部インターフェース仕様書
text: カラムヘッダ行に対し、列ごとに罫線を上書きできます: zone 罫線と列罫線の per-cell マージ: effective[j] = zone_header_border × col_spec[[j]]$border（後者が優先）。 S3 統一アーキテクチャと R6 を廃止した理由は LEARNING.md を参照。
code: rtftable(df,   border   = rtf_table_border(header = rtf_border(top = rtf_border_side(),                                                     bottom = rtf_border_side())),   col_spec = list(     list(col = "Total",          border = rtf_border(bottom = rtf_border_side("double", 20L)))   ) )

title: rtfreporter 外部インターフェース仕様書
text: 既定では罫線はカラムヘッダーブロックのみに引かれます。データ行・空白セパレータ・最終行のいずれにも自動の罫線は出ません。データ部の罫線が必要な場合は明示的に指定: border$header は カラムヘッダ「ブロック」全体の外枠を表します（v0.0.16 以降）。複数行のヘッダ（spanning 行 + ラベル行など）でもブロック全体に対して 1 つの外枠で扱われます。 中間ヘッダ行（最上段でも最下段でもない行）には自動で罫線は引かれません。個別に上書きしたい場合は: 列単位 → col_spec = list(list(col = j, border = rtf_border(...))) がカラムヘッダ行で zone 罫線に上乗せされる ゾーン単位 → 明示的に border = rtf_table_border(header = rtf_border(...), spanning = rtf_border(...)) を渡す 例（2 行ヘッダ + spanning 自動下線）:
code: rtf_border_side   — 1辺の罫線（style / width / color） rtf_border        — セル4辺（top / bottom / left / right） rtf_table_border  — テーブルゾーン別（header / spanning / body / first_row / last_row） # 1辺 rtf_border_side(style = "single", width = 15L, color = NULL) # style: "single" | "double" | "thick" | "dash" | "dot"  # 4辺 rtf_border(top = NULL, bottom = NULL, left = NULL, right = NULL)  # コンビニエンス rtf_border_none()                           # 全辺 NULL rtf_border_top(style, width, color)         # 上辺のみ rtf_border_bottom(style, width, color)      # 下辺のみ rtf_border_box(style, width, color)         # 全辺  # テーブル全体 rtf_table_border(header, spanning, body, first_row, last_row) rtf_border_tfl()  # 臨床 TFL 標準プリセット header:    上辺 single + 下辺 single     ← カラムヘッダ「ブロック」の外枠 spanning:  なし                          ← NULL のとき header にフォールバック body:      なし first_row: なし last_row:  なし                          ← データ部分は既定で罫線なし rtf_table_border(   header   = rtf_border(top = rtf_border_side(), bottom = rtf_border_side()),   last_row = rtf_border(bottom = rtf_border_side())   # ← 自分で opt-in ) ─────────────────────────  ← border$header$top （最上段に 1 本） │      │ Drug A │ Drug B │ │      ─────────────────  ← spanning 多列セルの下に自動下線 │ Item │ N │Mean│ N │Mean│ ─────────────────────────  ← border$header$bottom （最下段に 1 本）

title: rtfreporter 内部クラス設計書
text: rtfreporter パッケージは、臨床試験用の RTF レポートを生成するパッケージです。 v0.0.19 以降、すべての内部・外部クラスは S3 に統一されており、R6 は使用しません（Imports: R6 も DESCRIPTION から削除済み）。 ヘッダー/フッター、罫線、スタイルもすべて S3 plain list です。 パッケージ内では 2 種類の S3 オブジェクト形式を使い分けています。 S3 リストには structure(list(...), class = "...") で class タグを付与し、inherits() による型チェックとデバッグ表示（str(), print(), dput()）の両方が機能するようにしています。 旧 v0.0.18 までは rtfreport_r6 / rtftable_r6 / rtfplot_r6 / rtf_border（R6）/ rtf_table_style（R6）の 5 クラスが R6 でした。次の理由で全て S3 に置き換えました： _r6 系の内部クラスは寿命が短く参照セマンティクスが不要：.pipe_doc_to_rtfreport() でアダプタとして 1 度作り、レンダラーが読むだけ。S3 リスト + 関数型ヘルパー（.rtfreport_add_page(rep, ...) などで新コピーを返す）の方がシンプルかつ dput()/saveRDS() が綺麗に通る。 rtf_border (R6) の set_* / with_* / apply_override などのチェインビルダーは実コードでほぼ未使用：内部唯一の eff$with_bottom() / eff$override() 呼び出しは .merge_rtf_border() で 1 行に置換できた。 rtf_table_style (R6) の「共有可変テーマ」は実は機能していなかった：rtftable() コンストラクタが style の各フィールドを構築時にスナップショットしてしまうため、後から style$header_bold <- TRUE しても既存 table には反映されない。値コピーの S3 と何も変わらない。 S3 統一により得たもの： dput() / str() / print() / saveRDS() が綺麗に動く パイプ関数型コンポジションと整合（参照セマンティクスの混入なし） Imports: R6 を削除、外部依存ゼロ化 メンバ関数 vs 自由関数の混在が消え、コードベース全体が一貫した関数型に すべて S3 — class タグ付きの plain list / vector のみ twips 統一 — 寸法はすべて twips（フォントサイズ依存計算なし） RTF コマンドはリソースファイルに集約 — レンダラーにコマンドを埋め込まない “none” = コマンドなし — 罫線なしは該当 RTF コマンドを出力しない r2rtf / reporter 依存なし — 完全独立実装

title: rtfreporter 内部クラス設計書
text: ページ (pages) は文書レベルのフラットなリスト セクション (sections) は from_page でページ範囲を指定 セクションは 最低 1 つ必須。指定がない場合、.rtfreport_validate() 時に空のデフォルトセクション（ヘッダー/フッターなし）が自動生成される セクションの to_page はレンダラーが「次のセクションの from_page - 1」として自動計算する Important RTF では \sect でセクションが切り替わるたびに {\header} と {\footer} を出力する必要があります。 ヘッダーまたはフッターが NULL（継承）の場合でも、レンダラーは直前の値を用いて必ず両方を出力します。 rtfreport は S3 list であり、内部からは次の 関数型ヘルパー で操作します。すべて新コピーを返し、引数を破壊的に変更しません。
code: rtfreport ├── document              # 文書レベル設定（named list） │   ├── font_table │   ├── color_table │   ├── default_page      # 用紙・余白デフォルト │   └── default_format    # フォント・行高デフォルト │ ├── pages[]               # rtf_page オブジェクトのリスト（文書レベルで管理） │   └── rtf_page │       ├── title         # character vector（複数行可、デフォルト: center） │       ├── content       # rtftable | rtfplot | NULL（1ページ1つのみ） │       └── footnote      # character vector（複数行可、1×1テーブル表示） │ └── sections[]            # rtf_sect オブジェクトのリスト     └── rtf_sect         ├── header        # rtf_header() オブジェクト | named vector | NULL         ├── footer        # rtf_footer() オブジェクト | named vector | NULL         └── from_page     # integer：このセクションが始まるページ番号 pages:    [P1]  [P2]  [P3]  [P4]  [P5]            |_____|     |___________| sections: [sect A  ]  [sect B       ]           from_page=1  from_page=3 # コンストラクタ（内部専用） .new_page <- function(title = NULL, content = NULL, footnote = NULL) {   structure(     list(title = title, content = content, footnote = footnote),     class = "rtf_page"   ) } ┌──────────────────────────────┐  ← コンテンツ (rtftable / rtfplot) │  ... table or figure ...     │     width = content_width_twips └──────────────────────────────┘ ┌──────────────────────────────┐  ← フットノートテーブル（1行1列） │ Note: Values are mean (SD)   │     width = content_width_twips（同幅） │ Source: ADSL                 │     複数要素は \line で結合 └──────────────────────────────┘  ← デフォルト罫線: 上辺 single # コンストラクタ（内部専用） .new_sect <- function(header = NULL, footer = NULL, from_page = NULL) {   structure(     list(header = header, footer = footer, from_page = from_page),     class = "rtf_sect"   ) } .new_rtfreport(   font_table     = NULL,   # NULL = list(list(name = "Courier"))   color_table    = NULL,   # NULL = c("#000000")   default_page   = NULL,   # NULL = letter landscape 0.75/0.5インチ余白   default_format = NULL    # NULL = Courier 9pt single spacing ) # → class = "rtfreport" の S3 list # ページ追加（rtf_page オブジェクトとして格納） .rtfreport_add_page(report, title = NULL, content = NULL, footnote = NULL) # → 新しい rtfreport（pages に 1 件追加された copy）  # 取得・更新は通常のリスト操作で page <- report$pages[[i]] report$pages[[i]]$footnote <- "Note: ..." # セクション追加（rtf_sect オブジェクトとして格納） .rtfreport_add_section(report, header = NULL, footer = NULL, from_page = NULL) # → 新しい rtfreport（sections に 1 件追加された copy） # from_page = NULL → 最初のセクションとして from_page = 1 に解決  # 取得・更新は通常のリスト操作で sec <- report$sections[[i]] report$sections[[i]]$header <- new_header .rtfreport_set_font_table(report, font_table) .rtfreport_set_color_table(report, color_table) .rtfreport_set_default_page(report, page)       # 部分マージ .rtfreport_set_default_format(report, fmt)      # 部分マージ .rtfreport_validate(report) # 1. sections が空の場合は空のデフォルトセクションを自動生成して message() # 2. pages が最低 1 つあること（なければ stop） # 3. 各ページの content が rtftable | rtfplot | NULL であること # → 検証済み report を返す（必要なら sections を補ったコピー）

id: ヘッダーフッター操作関数

title: rtfreporter 内部クラス設計書
text: 動作ルール: update_header_row() と update_footer_row() は内部実装を共有し、 rtf_header() / rtf_footer() どちらの戻り値にも適用できます。
code: rtf_header(   rows,                      # named vector (1行) または list(named vecs) (複数行)   border           = NULL,   # rtf_border | NULL   width_twips      = NULL,   row_height_twips = NULL )  rtf_footer(   rows,   border           = rtf_border_top(),  # デフォルト: 上辺に横線   width_twips      = NULL,   row_height_twips = NULL ) update_header_row(header, row, content) update_footer_row(footer, row, content) # 例: 2行ヘッダーの3行目を追加 hdr <- rtf_header(rows = list(   c(l = "Protocol: XXX-001", r = "Company"),   c(l = "Table 14.1.1",     r = "Page {AUTO_PAGE} of {AUTO_TOTAL_PAGES}") ))  # 3行目を追加 hdr <- update_header_row(hdr, row = 3, content = c(c = "Subtitle"))  # 2行目だけを置き換え hdr <- update_header_row(hdr, row = 2, content = c(l = "Table 14.2.1", r = "Page {AUTO_PAGE}"))  # 5行目を追加（4行目は空行 c(c="") が自動補填される） hdr <- update_header_row(hdr, row = 5, content = c(c = "Draft"))

title: rtfreporter 内部クラス設計書

id: レンダリングアーキテクチャ
what: レンダリングアーキテクチャ
title: rtfreporter 内部クラス設計書
text: リソース読み込み・テンプレート テキスト処理パイプライン 罫線ヘルパー 列幅・セル・行ビルダー 行レンダラー（テーブル専用） コンテンツレンダラー 文書レベルヘルパー パイプ API アダプター すべての RTF コマンド文字列はコード中に直接書かず、このファイルの rtf_commands リストに集約しています。.load_rtf_commands() が初回のみファイルを読み込み、以降はキャッシュから返します。 document — 文書レベル制御 paragraph — 段落テンプレート table — テーブル行・セル制御 alignment — 水平配置コマンド border — 罫線コマンド 完全な罫線コマンドは side_prefix + style + \brdrwNN の連結で構成されます（例: \clbrdrt\brdrs\brdrw15）。 cell_valign — セル縦配置 text_decor — インラインテキスト装飾 picture — 図埋め込みテンプレート {picw}/{pich} = 元画像の実寸（px）、{picwgoal}/{pichgoal} = 表示寸法（twips）、{hex} = バイナリを 126 文字ごとに改行した hex 文字列。 fields — 動的ページ番号フィールド defaults — 調整可能なデフォルト値（inst/resources/rtfreporter_defaults.R） これらは管理者が必要に応じて調整できる。ヘルパー .default_row_height_twips(font_half_points) がルックアップ→線形フォールバック→下限クランプを行い、ヘッダ・フッタ・表・フットノートのレンダラから共通で利用される。
code: generate_rtfreport(report, file_path)   │   ├─ rtf_document の場合 → .pipe_doc_to_rtfreport() で rtfreport（内部 S3）に変換   │   ▼ .rtfreport_validate(report)   │   sections が空 → デフォルトセクション自動生成   │   ▼ .collect_report_colors() → .build_color_table_rtf() → .build_color_index_map()   │   文書全体の使用色を収集し、{\colortbl} を構築   │   ▼ RTF 文書ヘッダー出力   │   {\rtf1\ansi...} / {\fonttbl} / {\colortbl} / \paperw...\margl...   │   ▼ .resolve_sections(report)   │   from_page でソート → (from_page, to_page) 範囲リストを生成   │   ▼ セクションループ   │   ├─ ヘッダー/フッターの継承解決（NULL → 前セクションの値を引き継ぐ）   │   ├─ \sectd（セクション設定リセット）   │   ├─ .render_header_footer() → {\\header {content}}   │   ├─ .render_header_footer() → {\\footer {content}}   │   └─ ページループ (from_page..to_page)   │       ├─ タイトル: .cmd_fmt(center_bold_template, ...)   │       ├─ テーブル: .render_rtftable(ct, writable_w)   │       │   └─ .render_rtftable_section() × DF数   │       │       ├─ .render_spanning_rows()   │       │       ├─ .render_header_row() × ヘッダー行数   │       │       └─ .render_data_row()   × データ行数   │       ├─ 図:    .render_rtfplot(ct, writable_w)   │       ├─ 注釈: .render_footnote_table(footnote, fn_width)   │       └─ \page（セクション内）or \sect（セクション間）   │   ▼ } → writeLines(lines, file_path, useBytes = TRUE) \pard{align}{\pict\pngblip\picw{picw}\pich{pich}\picwgoal{picwgoal}\pichgoal{pichgoal} {hex} }\par # 1. 遅延読み込み（初回のみファイル I/O） cmds <- .load_rtf_commands()  # 2. テンプレート置換 .cmd_fmt(cmds$document$page_settings_template, list(   width_twips  = 15840,   height_twips = 12240,   ... ))  # 3. 直接参照（テンプレートでないもの） lines <- c(lines, cmds$document$page_break)   # → "\page" lines <- c(lines, cmds$document$section_break) # → "\sect" # 入力: report$sections（rtf_sect オブジェクトのリスト） # 出力: list(list(header, footer, from_page, to_page), ...)  1. from_page を抽出（NULL の場合は NA として扱う） 2. セクションが 1 つかつ from_page = NULL → from_page = 1 に設定 3. from_page でソート（NA は末尾） 4. 最初のセクションの from_page を強制的に 1 に設定 5. to_page = 次セクションの from_page - 1（最後のセクションは n_pages）

title: Pipe-Based API
text: rtfreporter package provides two complementary APIs building RTF reports: S3 Methods API (v0.0.6): Mutable object manipulation add_section(), add_page(), etc. Tidyverse Pipe API (v0.0.6+): Immutable functional composition %>% pipes vignette demonstrates Tidyverse Pipe API, inspired ggplot2 dplyr, providing clean, composable interface building complex RTF reports.

title: Pipe-Based API
text: basic workflow : Initialize document rtf_document() Configure document settings rtf_config() (optional) Add content (tables/figures) rtf_tables() / rtf_figures() — formatting arguments (col_rel_width, border, row_height_twips, …) can supplied apply bare data.frame / file-path elements Define sections rtf_section() Generate RTF generate_rtfreport()
code: library(rtfreporter)  # Create a simple report doc <- rtf_document() %>%   rtf_tables(list(mtcars)) %>%   rtf_section(page = 1, secinfo = list(header = NULL, footer = NULL))  # Generate RTF file generate_rtfreport(doc, "report.rtf")

previous_headings: API Functions > Initialization and Configuration
title: Pipe-Based API
text: Creates new RTF document object clinical trial defaults. Defaults: - Page: Landscape letter (11” × 8.5”) - Margins: 0.75” top/bottom, 0.5” left/right - Font: Courier - Colors: Black
code: doc <- rtf_document()  # With custom defaults doc <- rtf_document(   font_table = list(list(name = "Arial")),   page = list(     orientation = "portrait",     width_in = 8.5,     height_in = 11   ) )

previous_headings: API Functions > Initialization and Configuration
title: Pipe-Based API
text: Update document-level settings. Typically called creating document. Parameters: - font_table: Override font table - color_table: Override color table - page: Override page settings - default_format: Override default formatting parameters optional (NULL = change), making safe repeated calls:
code: doc <- rtf_document() %>%   rtf_config(page = list(orientation = "portrait"))

previous_headings: API Functions > Content Addition
title: Pipe-Based API
text: Add one contents pages. element tables list becomes exactly one page, holding single table figure. element must data.frame, rtftable() object, rtfplot() object. Table-formatting arguments (col_rel_width, border, row_height_twips, …) supplied rtf_tables() apply bare data.frame elements; pre-built rtftable() objects keep settings. auto_section = TRUE list named, name appended extra heading row header page, RTF sections split automatically — manual loop needed. See Auto-section: multi-page lab shift table complete example.
code: # Single content per page — shared formatting applies to bare data.frames doc <- rtf_document() %>%   rtf_tables(     list(df1, df2, rtftable(df3, border = "none")),     col_rel_width    = c(2, 1, 1),     border           = "tfl",     row_height_twips = 280L   ) # df1 / df2 inherit col_rel_width / border / row_height_twips. # rtftable(df3, border="none") keeps border="none". # Named list + auto_section = TRUE  →  one RTF section per element doc <- rtf_document() |>   rtf_section(secinfo = list(header = common_hdr, footer = common_ftr)) |>   rtf_tables(     list("Parameter A" = tbl_a, "Parameter B" = tbl_b),     auto_section = TRUE            # label_align = "left" (default)   )

previous_headings: API Functions > Content Addition
title: Pipe-Based API
text: page can carry title (content) footnote (). character vectors — one element per line. Empty strings "" produce blank lines. Title default (NULL): one centred blank line content. Title character(0): title block suppressed entirely. Title default style: centred, bold non-empty lines. Footnote: left-aligned paragraphs; first paragraph carries top border visual separator content . text inherits document font size (one font per document, 9pt default).
code: rtf_document() %>%   rtf_tables(list(df1, df2),     titles = list(       c("Table 14.1.1", "", "Safety Population"),       "Table 14.1.2"     ),     footnotes = list(       c("Note 1: foo.", "", "Note 2: bar."),       NULL     )   )  # Or assign separately after content has been added doc %>%   rtf_tables(list(df1, df2)) %>%   rtf_titles(list("Page 1", "Page 2")) %>%   rtf_footnotes(list(NULL, "Footer for page 2."))

previous_headings: API Functions > Content Addition
title: Pipe-Based API
text: Add image files figure pages. element becomes exactly one page. Elements may character file paths (PNG/JPEG) pre-built rtfplot() objects. width_twips / height_twips / align apply bare paths .
code: doc <- rtf_document() %>%   rtf_figures(     list("plot1.png", "plot2.png", rtfplot("plot3.png", align = "left")),     width_twips = 9000L   )

previous_headings: API Functions > Structure Definition
title: Pipe-Based API
text: Map page numbers sections headers footers. Template section (auto_section): Omit page register common header/footer template rtf_tables(auto_section = TRUE) use base.
code: # Single section starting at page 1 doc <- rtf_document() %>%   rtf_tables(list(df1, df2, df3)) %>%   rtf_section(page = 1, secinfo = list(     header = rtf_header(rows = list(l = "Analysis", r = "Table 1")),     footer = rtf_footer(rows = list(c = "Page {AUTO_PAGE} of {AUTO_TOTAL_PAGES}"))   ))  # Multiple sections doc <- rtf_document() %>%   rtf_tables(list(df1, df2, df3)) %>%   rtf_section(     page = c(1, 3),     secinfo = list(       list(header = h1, footer = f1),  # Section 1 (pages 1-2)       list(header = h2, footer = f2)   # Section 2 (pages 3+)     )   ) doc <- rtf_document() |>   rtf_section(secinfo = list(header = common_hdr, footer = common_ftr))   # page= is omitted → stored as "_default" template

previous_headings: API Functions
title: Pipe-Based API
text: Apply formatting directly via constructor functions: tables: use rtftable() per-element full control, pass shared formatting arguments rtf_tables(). figures: use rtfplot() per-element, pass shared arguments rtf_figures(). headers/footers: use rtf_header() / rtf_footer() together rtf_section(). 廃止予定: かつて存在した rtf_table_format(), rtf_header_format(), rtf_footer_format(), rtf_figure_format() の 4 関数は実際の出力に何も影響 しない dead-code だったため deprecate されました。書式は上記のように rtf_tables() / rtftable() / rtf_header() / rtf_footer() の引数として 直接指定してください。
code: # Per-page control via rtftable() — full set of formatting arguments doc <- rtf_document() %>%   rtf_tables(list(     rtftable(df1, border = "tfl",  row_height_twips = 280L, col_rel_width = c(2,1,1)),     rtftable(df2, border = "none", row_height_twips = 320L)   ))  # Shared defaults for multiple bare data.frames in one call doc <- rtf_document() %>%   rtf_tables(list(df1, df2, df3),              border = "tfl", row_height_twips = 280L,              col_rel_width = c(2, 1, 1))

title: Pipe-Based API
code: library(rtfreporter) library(magrittr)  # For %>% pipe  # Prepare data df_safety <- data.frame(   Event = c("Headache", "Nausea", "Dizziness"),   Mild = c(5, 3, 2),   Moderate = c(2, 1, 1),   Severe = c(0, 0, 1) )  df_efficacy <- data.frame(   Response = c("Complete", "Partial", "No Response"),   Count = c(25, 15, 10),   Percent = c("50%", "30%", "20%") )  # Create report report <- rtf_document() %>%   # Configure document (one-time)   rtf_config(page = list(     orientation = "landscape",     width_in = 11,     height_in = 8.5   )) %>%   # Add content with shared formatting   rtf_tables(list(df_safety, df_efficacy),              border = "tfl", row_height_twips = 280L) %>%   # Define sections with headers/footers   rtf_section(page = 1, secinfo = list(     header = rtf_header(rows = list(       l = "Clinical Study Report",       r = "Safety Analysis"     )),     footer = rtf_footer(rows = list(       c = "Page {AUTO_PAGE} of {AUTO_TOTAL_PAGES}"     ))   )) %>%   rtf_section(page = 2, secinfo = list(     header = rtf_header(rows = list(       l = "Clinical Study Report",       r = "Efficacy Analysis"     )),     footer = rtf_footer(rows = list(       c = "Page {AUTO_PAGE} of {AUTO_TOTAL_PAGES}"     ))   ))  # Generate RTF file generate_rtfreport(report, "clinical_report.rtf", overwrite = TRUE)

title: Pipe-Based API
text: common clinical reporting pattern shift table repeated several laboratory parameters (e.g. RBC, WBC, Haemoglobin) — page, identical layout different heading line identifying parameter. auto_section feature requires manual loop.

previous_headings: Auto-section: Multi-page Lab Shift Table
title: Pipe-Based API
code: library(rtfreporter)  data_dir <- system.file("extdata", package = "rtfreporter") lab_rbc <- readRDS(file.path(data_dir, "lab_rbc.rds")) lab_wbc <- readRDS(file.path(data_dir, "lab_wbc.rds")) lab_hgb <- readRDS(file.path(data_dir, "lab_hgb.rds"))  # Spanning header and column-header row (identical for all parameters) spanning_hdr <- list(   list(from = 2L,  to = 7L,  label = "Drug A (N=30)", underline = TRUE),   list(from = 8L,  to = 13L, label = "Drug B (N=30)", underline = TRUE),   list(from = 14L, to = 19L, label = "Total (N=60)",  underline = TRUE) ) col_hdr <- c("Baseline\nGrade", rep(c("0","1","2","3","4","Total"), 3L))  make_shift_tbl <- function(df) {   rtftable(     df,     col_header          = col_hdr,     spanning_header     = spanning_hdr,     column_widths_twips = c(1200L, rep(733L, 18L)),     col_spec = c(       list(list(col = 1, align = "left")),       lapply(2:19, function(j) list(col = j, align = "center"))     ),     row_height_twips = 360L,     border           = "tfl",     table_align      = "left"   ) }

previous_headings: Auto-section: Multi-page Lab Shift Table
title: Pipe-Based API
text: header 5 fixed rows common pages. Row 6 — parameter name — added automatically auto_section.
code: common_hdr <- rtf_header(rows = list(   c(l = "Protocol: STUDY001",     r = "DRAFT"),   c(l = "Drug Co., Ltd.",     r = "Page {AUTO_PAGE} of {AUTO_TOTAL_PAGES}"),   c(c = "Table 14.x.x.x  Shift table of Toxicity Grade"),   c(c = "<Safety Analysis Set>"),   c(c = "")   # blank row — row 6 appended automatically per section ))  common_ftr <- rtf_footer(rows = list(   c(l = paste0(     "Note: Percentages are based on the number of subjects in the Safety ",     "Analysis Set (N) for each treatment group. ",     "Run date: ", Sys.Date()   )) ))

previous_headings: Auto-section: Multi-page Lab Shift Table
what: Build the report — the new way
title: Pipe-Based API
code: doc <- rtf_document() |>   rtf_config(page = list(     orientation    = "landscape",     width_in       = 11,    height_in      = 8.5,     margin_top_in  = 0.75,  margin_bottom_in = 0.75,     margin_left_in = 0.5,   margin_right_in  = 0.5   )) |>   # Register the common header/footer as the "_default" template   # (page= is intentionally omitted)   rtf_section(secinfo = list(header = common_hdr, footer = common_ftr)) |>   # Named list → one RTF section per element   # The element name is appended as a left-aligned row 6 in the header   rtf_tables(     list(       "Red Blood Cell Count (10^6/uL)"   = make_shift_tbl(lab_rbc),       "White Blood Cell Count (10^3/uL)" = make_shift_tbl(lab_wbc),       "Hemoglobin (g/dL)"                = make_shift_tbl(lab_hgb)     ),     auto_section = TRUE          # section_label_align = "left" by default   )  generate_rtfreport(doc, "lab_shift.rtf", overwrite = TRUE)

title: Clinical RTF Reporting with rtfreporter
text: analyte occupies RTF section analyte name appears section header, changing page page.
code: make_shift_df <- function(a_low, a_norm, a_high, b_low, b_norm, b_high) {   data.frame(     Baseline = c("Low", "Normal", "High"),     A_Low    = a_low,  A_Normal = a_norm,  A_High = a_high,     B_Low    = b_low,  B_Normal = b_norm,  B_High = b_high,     stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE   ) }  lab_data <- list(   list(label = "ALT (Alanine Aminotransferase)",        df    = make_shift_df(c(4,0,0), c(1,13,1), c(0,2,3),                              c(3,0,0), c(1,14,0), c(0,1,4))),   list(label = "AST (Aspartate Aminotransferase)",        df    = make_shift_df(c(5,0,0), c(0,11,2), c(0,1,5),                              c(4,0,0), c(1,12,1), c(0,2,4))),   list(label = "HGB (Hemoglobin)",        df    = make_shift_df(c(2,1,0), c(1,16,1), c(0,1,2),                              c(3,0,0), c(0,15,2), c(0,2,2))) )  spanning_hdr <- list(   list(from = 2L, to = 4L, label = "Treatment A  (N=24)", underline = TRUE),   list(from = 5L, to = 7L, label = "Treatment B  (N=24)", underline = TRUE) ) col_hdr    <- c("Baseline", "Low", "Normal", "High", "Low", "Normal", "High") col_widths <- c(2160L, 900L, 900L, 900L, 900L, 900L, 900L)  col_spec_shift <- lapply(seq_len(7L), function(j)   list(col = j, align = if (j == 1L) "left" else "center"))  common_footer <- rtf_footer(   rows = list(     c(l = "ALT=Alanine Aminotransferase; AST=Aspartate Aminotransferase; HGB=Hemoglobin"),     c(l = "Low/Normal/High: site reference range categories.", r = "CONFIDENTIAL")   ) )  # Build document: one section per analyte doc <- rtf_document()  for (i in seq_along(lab_data)) {   item <- lab_data[[i]]    tbl <- rtftable(     data                = item$df,     col_header          = col_hdr,     spanning_header     = spanning_hdr,     col_spec            = col_spec_shift,     column_widths_twips = col_widths,     border              = "tfl",     row_height_twips    = 280L   )    sec_header <- rtf_header(rows = list(     c(l = "Protocol: LAB-001",                             r = "ACME Pharma"),     c(l = "Study Title: Phase III Safety Lab Assessment",   r = "Page {AUTO_PAGE} of {AUTO_TOTAL_PAGES}"),     c(c = "Table 14.3.1  Laboratory Shift Table (Safety Population)"),     c(l = item$label)   ))    doc <- doc %>%     rtf_section(page = i, secinfo = list(header = sec_header, footer = common_footer)) %>%     rtf_tables(list(tbl)) }  generate_rtfreport(doc, tempfile(fileext = ".rtf"), overwrite = TRUE)

code: make_rtf <- function(df, hdr_text, path) {   doc <- rtf_document() %>%     rtf_section(page = 1, secinfo = list(       header = rtf_header(rows = list(         c(l = hdr_text, r = "Page {AUTO_PAGE} of {AUTO_TOTAL_PAGES}")       )),       footer = rtf_footer(rows = list(c(l = "CONFIDENTIAL")))     )) %>%     rtf_tables(list(df))   generate_rtfreport(doc, path, overwrite = TRUE) }  f1 <- tempfile(fileext = ".rtf"); make_rtf(mtcars[1:3, ], "Table 14.1 DM", f1) f2 <- tempfile(fileext = ".rtf"); make_rtf(mtcars[4:6, ], "Table 14.2 AE", f2)  assembled <- tempfile(fileext = ".rtf") assemble_rtf(c(f1, f2), assembled, overwrite = TRUE)

title: Clinical RTF Reporting with rtfreporter
text: blank_rows accepts three combinable spec modes — integer positions, variable-change detection, regex rule. Combine list() positions unioned.
code: df_demog <- data.frame(   Group    = c("Sex",    "Sex",     "Sex",                 "Race",   "Race",    "Race",                 "Total"),   Category = c("Male",   "Female",  "Subtotal",                 "Asian",  "Other",   "Subtotal",                 ""),   N        = c(45L, 35L, 80L, 40L, 40L, 80L, 80L),   stringsAsFactors = FALSE )  # Mode 1: integer positions (-1 = after the last row) tbl1 <- rtftable(df_demog, blank_rows = c(0, 3, 6, -1))  # Mode 2: blank when a variable's value changes tbl2 <- rtftable(df_demog,   blank_rows = blank_rows_by_change("Group",     include_before_first = FALSE, include_after_last = FALSE))  # Mode 3: regex match (e.g. before every "Total" row) tbl3 <- rtftable(df_demog,   blank_rows = blank_rows_by_rule("Group", "^Total", where = "before"))  # Combination — positions are unioned tbl4 <- rtftable(df_demog,   blank_rows = list(     c(-1),     blank_rows_by_change("Group",       include_before_first = FALSE, include_after_last = FALSE),     blank_rows_by_rule("Category", "^Subtotal", where = "after")   ))  # Or attach an attribute to the data frame and let read_attributes pick it up attr(df_demog, "rtf_blank_rows") <- c(0, 3, 6, -1) tbl5 <- rtftable(df_demog)   # read_attributes = TRUE by default

title: Clinical RTF Reporting with rtfreporter
text: rtf_tables() rtf_figures() accept parallel titles footnotes lists — one entry per page, character vector whose elements become individual paragraph lines. "" produces blank line; NULL falls back package defaults (title = one blank centred line; footnote). Titles render centred bold paragraphs; footnotes render left-aligned paragraphs top divider line first line. inherit document font size (one font per document, 9 pt default).
code: doc <- rtf_document() %>%   rtf_tables(     list(df_demog, df_demog),     titles = list(       c("Table 14.1.1", "", "Demographics (Safety Population)"),       c("Table 14.1.2", "", "Demographics by Region")     ),     footnotes = list(       c("Source: ADSL.", "", "N = 160 subjects."),       NULL     ),     border           = "tfl",     row_height_twips = 280L   )  # Or set them after content has been added doc <- rtf_document() %>%   rtf_tables(list(df_demog, df_demog)) %>%   rtf_titles(list("Page One", "Page Two")) %>%   rtf_footnotes(list(NULL, "Source: ADSL."))

title: Clinical RTF Reporting with rtfreporter
text: rtf_table_style() builds table-style record bundles default borders, alignment, padding row-height. Pass record many rtftable() calls table snapshots defaults needs construction time. derive variant, call rtf_table_style_with(). S3 architecture documented LEARNING.md.
code: tfl <- rtf_table_style_tfl()   # built-in TFL preset  # Hand the same record to many tables tables <- lapply(list(df_demog, df_demog, df_demog),                   function(df) rtftable(df, style = tfl, row_height_twips = 280L))  # Non-mutating derivation heavy_tfl <- rtf_table_style_with(tfl,   border_last_row = rtf_border(bottom = rtf_border_side("double", 20L)) )

what: 🔴 Breaking Changes (v0.0.19) — R6 removed; full S3 architecture
title: Changelog
text: Every internal R6 class replaced plain S3 list Imports: R6 dependency dropped. Rationale: R6 features package used (-place mutation, chained builders, shared mutable themes) either snapshotted away construction time used exactly one internal call site — none survived rendered output. S3 design simpler, dput()-able, serialises cleanly saveRDS(). User-facing class names: API surface changes: Method chains (b$set_top(), b$with_top(), b$apply_override(), b$override()) → removed. Use rtf_border_with(b, top = ...) non-mutating derivation. style$clone_with(...) → replaced rtf_table_style_with(style, ...). rtf_table_style$new(...) → call rtf_table_style(...) function. rtftable_r6$new(...) / rtfplot_r6$new(...) → call rtftable() / rtfplot() (public wrappers already place). internal pipe-adapter renamed: .pipe_doc_to_r6_report() → .pipe_doc_to_rtfreport(). inherits(x, "rtftable_r6") / inherits(x, "rtfplot_r6") / inherits(x, "rtfreport_r6") → use "rtftable" / "rtfplot" / "rtfreport". “share style; mutate ; every existing table reflects change” behaviour gone — never worked consistently anyway. Build new style rtf_table_style_with() hand new tables. LEARNING.md rewritten describe unified S3 design reasoning behind retiring R6.

what: 🔴 Breaking Changes (v0.0.18) — data section has no default borders
title: Changelog
text: rtf_border_tfl() preset previously set last_row = rtf_border(bottom = ...), drew horizontal line last data row (, blank_rows = c(-1), line appeared trailing blank row). Per locked design contract default borders belong column-header block , preset now: column-header block keeps outer frame: top border topmost header row, bottom border bottommost. Multi-column spanning cells still auto-receive bottom border (group underline) last header row. horizontal vertical lines anywhere data section default. Trailing blank rows blank_rows = c(-1) longer acquire phantom line . Callers relied old TFL look can opt back explicitly: rtf_table_style_tfl() updated lockstep: border_last_row field now left NULL.
code: rtf_table_border(   header   = rtf_border(top = s, bottom = s),   # outer frame of header block   spanning = NULL,                               # falls back to header   body     = NULL,   first_row = NULL,   last_row  = NULL                               # was: rtf_border(bottom = s) ) border = rtf_table_border(   header   = rtf_border(top = rtf_border_side(), bottom = rtf_border_side()),   last_row = rtf_border(bottom = rtf_border_side()) )

what: Spanning rows inherit alignment from the level below
title: Changelog
text: spanning_header cells previously rendered hard-coded \qc (centre) alignment. now inherit alignment level immediately — .e. leftmost covered column’s header_align (cascades col_spec[[j]]$align). title: Changelog
text: blank_rows argument now accepts three orthogonal specification modes can freely combined inside list (positions unioned, deduplicated, sorted): Integer positions — c(0, 5, -1). 0 first data row, k row k, -1 means “last data row”. --range integers warn dropped. variable change — blank_rows_by_change(cols, ...). Inserts blank separator whenever value listed column differs previous row. include_before_first include_after_last (TRUE default) add rows start end. rule — blank_rows_by_rule(col, pattern, ). Inserts blank row every data row whose value col matches regular expression pattern.
code: rtftable(df, blank_rows = list(   c(-1),                                            # after the last row   blank_rows_by_change("Visit",     include_before_first = FALSE,     include_after_last   = FALSE),                  # at every Visit change   blank_rows_by_rule("Parameter", "^Total", "before") ))

title: Changelog

Footnotes row height either. result, raising document font size left visual layout sync. v0.0.8 every table-shaped element (RTF header, RTF footer, table column header rows, table data rows, blank separator rows, footnote rows) shares single, font-size-aware default looked inst/resources/rtfreporter_defaults.R: Admins can edit table (linear fallback ) without touching package code. what: rtfreporter — Clinical RTF Reporting Toolkit for R
title: rtfreporter — Clinical RTF Reporting Toolkit for R
text: rtfreporter standalone R toolkit generating Rich Text Format (RTF) reports clinical trial deliverables — Tables, Listings Figures (TFLs). offers functional, pipe-friendly API composing multi-section RTF documents clinical-style borders, multi-row column headers (including spanning groups), automatic page-number fields, embedded figures. purposely independent: dependency r2rtf, reporter, RTF packages, R6/S7 dependency — just base R S3.

title: rtfreporter — Clinical RTF Reporting Toolkit for R
text: Clinical-first — defaults follow common TFL conventions (header outer frame + spanning group underlines, body borders, font-size aware row heights). Composable pipe API — rtf_document() %>% rtf_section() %>% rtf_tables(). Reproducible page numbering across assembled deliverables — dynamic {AUTO_PAGE} / {AUTO_TOTAL_PAGES} tokens, plus assemble_rtf() concatenate per-output RTFs one TFL package. S3, R6 — dput() / str() / saveRDS() round-trip cleanly. Zero hard dependencies — works modern R box.

title: Learning Notes — class systems in rtfreporter
text: billed canonical R6 win: define theme , hand instance many tables, mutate , watch every table reflect change. practice worked nested rtf_border mutations happened passed as_table_border() unchanged. Every scalar field (header_bold, header_align, cell_padding_*, …) snapshotted rtftable constructor build time, mutating style construction silently ignored. promised semantics inconsistent; simpler S3 model (build style, hand tables, derive variants rtf_table_style_with()) honest actually happens.

title: Learning Notes — class systems in rtfreporter
text: rtf_theme R6 object rtfreporter. kept focused, well-justified counter-example “everything S3” default.

previous_headings: The one R6 class: rtf_theme
what: What makes it the right tool here
title: Learning Notes — class systems in rtfreporter
text: classic snapshot pattern — rtftable(df, style = my_style) — bakes style fields rtftable construction. Mutating my_style afterwards affect tables already snapshotted . correct, predictable S3 behaviour. theme, contrast, meant : shared many tables look , mutated construction retune look, observed renderer next render reflects change. rtf_theme R6 class whose instances stored rtftable() reference. render time .refresh_theme(tbl) re-snapshots theme’s current state applies delegating regular renderer. S3 without either () rebuilding every table mutation, (b) passing theme every render call — clumsy. Explicit rtftable() arguments (e.g. col_header_align = "right") still beat theme defaults, users get best worlds: opinionated central defaults plus per-table overrides.
code: theme <- rtf_theme(header_bold = FALSE) t1 <- rtftable(df1, theme = theme) t2 <- rtftable(df2, theme = theme)  # Render — both tables have non-bold headers.  theme$header_bold <- TRUE  # Render again — both tables now show bold headers, no rebuild required.

Users want runtime dependency R6 simply ignore rtf_theme(); users want shared mutable themes opt install.packages("R6").

title: Split a table object into per-page data.frames — paginate
text: x supported table object (`gt_tbl`, `data.frame`/tibble, `list` ). ... Method-specific extras. max_rows Integer.  Maximum body rows per page.  Required `split` mode `"none"`. split Splitting strategy: `"none"` (default), `"rows"`, `"group_safe"`, `"group_force"`.  See **Splitting strategies** package vignette. split_rows Integer vector 1-based row indices start new pages.  used `split = "rows"`. group_col Column name 1-based index identifying group. `NULL` (default) auto-detects groups leading-space indentation column 1. cont_label Suffix appended group label continuation pages (used group-aware splits).  Default `" (Cont.)"`. blank_rows Blank-row specification: * `NULL` (default) — blank rows added. * integer vector — positions within page. * `"between_groups"` — auto-insert blank row every group   transition within page. * `list(...)` — union positions.

title: Split a table object into per-page data.frames — paginate

Requires optional   `gt` package; informative error raised otherwise. * `paginate.data.frame()` — plain data.frames / tibbles.    real work happens; gt method extracts data.frame delegates   . * `paginate.list()` — recurses every element concatenates   resulting pages input order. New table-object types can supported adding another `paginate.<class>()` method — see `vignette("paginate")` example.

title: RTF table object — rtftable
text: data data.frame, list data.frames   number columns.  list supplied every data.frame   rendered consecutively, preceded column-header   (optionally) spanning-header rows. col_header Column header specification.  One : NULL — use column names single header row. character vector — one element per column (single header row). pipe-delimited string "| B | C". list multiple header rows (shared across       data.frames data list). data list N data.frames: list exactly       N header specs (one per data.frame) — detected list length       equals N every element NULL, character vector,       list--character-vectors. spanning_header list spanning-header specs.  element   named list (int), (int), label (chr),   underline (logical).  data list spanning header   repeated data.frame. col_spec list per-column formatting specs.  element   named list col (column index name) plus :   align ("left"/"center"/"right"),   bold, italic, underline (logical),   indent_twips (integer),   header_bold, header_italic, header_align. border Border specification.  "tfl" (default) applies   Clinical-TFL standard (header top+bottom, last-data-row bottom,   vertical lines).  NULL disables borders.   rtf_table_border object named list gives full control. blank_rows Integer vector positions insert blank   separator row data section.  0 inserts one first   data row; k inserts one data row k. col_rel_width Numeric vector relative column widths   (e.g. c(3, 1, 1) distributes 3:1:1).  Ignored   column_widths_twips set. column_widths_twips Integer vector absolute column widths   twips.  Takes precedence col_rel_width. table_width_twips Total table width twips (absolute).  Used   col_rel_width column_widths_twips set.   1440 twips = 1 inch. table_width_pct Table width percentage (0–100)   writable page width.  100 = full writable width (margins margins).   Takes precedence table_width_pct_of_writable. table_width_pct_of_writable Table width fraction (0–1)   writable page width.  Kept backward compatibility;   prefer table_width_pct. table_align Horizontal placement table page.   "left" (default), "center", "right".   Emits \trqc \trqr RTF row definition;   "left" uses RTF default. row_height_twips Row height twips data rows.  0   (default) = automatic height.  Always specify positive integer; use   row_height_exact = TRUE fixed (clipped) height. row_height_exact Logical.  FALSE (default) = minimum   height (\trrh positive; rows expand content taller).   TRUE = exact height (\trrh negative; content   clipped taller). header_row_height_twips Row height header/spanning rows.   NULL uses row_height_twips. blank_row_height_twips Height blank separator rows twips.   NULL (default) uses row_height_twips. cell_padding_left_twips Left cell padding twips (default 0 since v0.0.21; cell content sits flush cell border). cell_padding_right_twips Right cell padding twips (default 0). cell_valign Vertical cell alignment: "bottom" (default),   "top", "center".

title: RTF table object — rtftable
code: # --- Minimal single-DF table ------------------------------------------------- df <- data.frame(USUBJID = c("101-001", "101-002"), AGE = c(54L, 61L)) tbl <- rtftable(df)  # --- Table width and alignment ----------------------------------------------- # 70 percent of page width, centered tbl2 <- rtftable(df,   table_width_pct = 70,   table_align     = "center")  # Absolute width, right-aligned tbl3 <- rtftable(df,   table_width_twips = 7200L,   table_align       = "right")  # --- Relative column widths -------------------------------------------------- tbl4 <- rtftable(df,   col_rel_width     = c(2, 1),   table_width_twips = 9000L)  # --- Spanning header --------------------------------------------------------- counts <- data.frame(   Baseline = c("Low", "Normal", "High"),   A_Low = c(4L, 0L, 0L), A_Norm = c(1L, 13L, 1L), A_High = c(0L, 2L, 3L),   B_Low = c(3L, 0L, 0L), B_Norm = c(1L, 14L, 0L), B_High = c(0L, 1L, 4L) ) shift_tbl <- rtftable(   data            = counts,   col_header      = c("Baseline", "Low", "Normal", "High", "Low", "Normal", "High"),   spanning_header = list(     list(from = 2L, to = 4L, label = "Treatment A (N=24)", underline = TRUE),     list(from = 5L, to = 7L, label = "Treatment B (N=24)", underline = TRUE)   ),   column_widths_twips = c(2160L, 900L, 900L, 900L, 900L, 900L, 900L),   border              = "tfl",   row_height_twips    = 280L )  # --- Multi data.frame (shared spanning header, per-DF col_header) ------------ df1 <- data.frame(A = 1:2, B = 3:4) df2 <- data.frame(A = 5:6, B = 7:8) tbl_multi <- rtftable(   data       = list(df1, df2),   col_header = list(c("Group 1 A", "Group 1 B"), c("Group 2 A", "Group 2 B")) )  # --- col_spec: first column left, rest centered ------------------------------ tbl5 <- rtftable(df,   col_spec = list(     list(col = 1L, align = "left"),     list(col = 2L, align = "center")   ) )

title: rtfreporter (development version)
text: paginate() — unified table-object per-page data.frame list (#2). Single S3 entry point converts [gt::gt()] table, plain data.frame, list either list data.frames sized one RTF page , ready passed rtf_tables(). Splitting strategies: split = "none" (default) — pass single page. split = "rows" — manual force-split row indices split_rows. split = "group_safe" — pack whole groups onto page; spill overflow. single group larger max_rows force-split (Cont.) continuation rows. split = "group_force" — cut every max_rows; cut lands inside group, next page begins <label> (Cont.) header row whose summary value cells blanked . Groups either auto-detected leading-whitespace indentation first column (default) specified explicitly via group_col =. Blank-row positions can supplied integer vector, keyword "between_groups" (auto-inserts blank detected groups), list(...) combining . Positions attached rtf_blank_rows attribute returned data.frame consumed automatically rtftable(read_attributes = TRUE). Extending new table-object type one S3 method: Added Suggests:: gt (>= 0.9.0).
code: paginate.your_class <- function(x, ...) {   df <- ...extract a data.frame from x...   paginate.data.frame(df, ...) }

previous_headings: rtfreporter 0.0.21
title: rtfreporter (development version)
text: Unified column-header API. Multi-row column headers can now written single uniform form using pos = cell specs, regardless whether top-row spanning row plain label row. Previously first row use either col_header (spanning) spanning_header (separate argument); now spanning every level (including first) expressed way. col_cell(pos, label, ...) — one cell. pos = 1 single column; pos = c(2, 5) spans data columns 2–5. Positions always refer underlying data columns. rtf_col_header(row1, row2, ...) — collect rows top--bottom. add_col_header_row(hdr, row, .position = c("bottom", "top")) — incremental builder. Example: bare list col_cell()s auto-wrapped single header row, col_header = list(col_cell(1, "Item"), col_cell(c(2, 3), "M (SD)")) works. previously-accepted forms (c("", "B", "C"), mixed lists list(, , label, ...) specs, standalone spanning_header = argument) continue work unchanged.
code: rtftable(df, col_header = rtf_col_header(   list(col_cell(1, ""), col_cell(c(2, 5), "Treatment")),   list(col_cell(1, ""),        col_cell(c(2, 3), "Drug A"),        col_cell(c(4, 5), "Drug B")),   c("Item", "N", "Mean", "N", "Mean") ))

previous_headings: rtfreporter 0.0.21
what: Default changes (potentially visible to existing reports)
title: rtfreporter (development version)
text: Cell padding default lowered 0 twips (72 twips ≈ 0.05 inch sides). Header, footer content-table cells now sit flush cell border default, matching typical clinical TFL look. Callers want old behaviour can opt : rtftable(..., cell_padding_left_twips = 72L, cell_padding_right_twips = 72L). Reflected inst/resources/rtfreporter_defaults.R. top / bottom: 0.75 inch → 0.9 inch left / right: 0.5 inch → 0.6 inch Callers passing explicit page metrics unaffected.

DESCRIPTION modernised: full author/maintainer information, URL, BugReports, expanded Description, Depends: R (>= 4.1), optional Suggests: testthat covr. LICENSE converted CRAN’s YEAR / COPYRIGHT HOLDER template full MIT text moved LICENSE.md. README.md rewritten installation instructions, runnable 30-second example, badges. Community files added: CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, GitHub issue pull-request templates.

title: rtfreporter (development version)
text: Removed R6 usage. rtftable_r6, rtfplot_r6, rtfreport_r6, R6 versions rtf_border rtf_table_style now plain S3 records. class names lose _r6 suffix (inherits(x, "rtftable") etc.). Imports: R6 dropped DESCRIPTION. rtf_border_with(b, top = ..., bottom = ..., ...) non-mutating border derivation. rtf_table_style_with(style, ...) non-mutating style derivation. rtf_table_style(...) now called function (rtf_table_style$new(...)). “share style instance, mutate , see every existing table reflect change” pattern longer applies. rtftable() call snapshots style fields needs construction time. Build new style rtf_table_style_with() pass new tables.
